Relative to the selected COGS row 'Cost of sales', this is not clearly a separate COGS-specific D&A line that should be added.

This is a generic amortization row in the operating-expense detail block, with no visible values and no wording tying it to Cost of sales. Adding it to COGS would risk misclassification and double counting.

candidates.why: Generic depreciation rows are shown in a separate operating-expense detail section with no visible values and without explicit linkage to the selected SG&A component rows ('Logistics, sales and marketing expenses', 'Administrative expenses', 'Other operating expenses'). They may already be embedded in those component expenses or may relate more broadly to operations, so adding them separately would risk double counting.
